query:
-- Match invoice account numbers to database customers
-- Account numbers from invoices: 96792 (890163), 94178 (890134), 94983 (890155), 93599 (890124), 96149 (890190), 94152 (890122)
SELECT 
  c.externalId,
  c.name,
  c.accountNumber,
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.dataSource
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerId = c.id
WHERE c.accountNumber IN ('96792', '94178', '94983', '93599', '96149', '94152')
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
ORDER BY c.accountNumber;
